creator: kjozic@gmail.com
text:
Hello Torsten,

Wasmer has three compilers: LLVM, Singlepass, and Cranelift.
In the build logs, I see that the build of the LLVM compiler fails.
In the Makefile you can enable/disable each individually if you have time for these tests.

If this solves the problem, the problematic compiler can stay disabled for some time as a temporary measure (which I did in the past).

Also, version 4.3.4 is out (they have very irregular intervals). Hence, there is no need to waste much time because a new version may solve this problem, or introduce another (which already happened in the past).




With best regards,
     Krešimir
